name: Community State Bank Of Orbisonia
description_short: Community State Bank of Orbisonia is a local community bank operating nine locations across rural Pennsylvania counties, offering personal and business banking services with a commitment to reinvesting 4% of net income back into communities.
description_long:
Community State Bank of Orbisonia is a community-focused financial institution serving customers across Huntingdon, Fulton, Bedford, and Franklin Counties in Pennsylvania. The bank operates nine convenient locations and positions itself as committed to supporting both customers and the communities in which they operate, with an explicit mission centered on enriching lives and elevating communities.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial services including personal checking and savings accounts, business accounts, personal and auto loans, mortgage services, and investing and retirement products. They provide digital banking conveniences such as a mobile app with features like mobile deposit, bill pay, and Zelle money transfer capabilities. The bank also offers educational resources through how-to videos and access to competitive market rates.

What distinguishes Community State Bank is its explicit community reinvestment commitment, pledging to return at least 4% of net income annually to the communities it serves. The bank also facilitates access to the PA Forward Student Loan Program through partnership with the Pennsylvania Higher Education Assistance Agency (PHEAA), helping local students finance higher education. This emphasis on community partnership and local investment sets it apart from larger regional and national banking competitors.

As a traditional community bank with nine physical locations, Community State Bank serves customers who prioritize local banking relationships and community reinvestment. However, prospective customers should note that the bank appears to lack third-party reviews and detailed rate/fee information on their website, and geographic service is limited to four counties in central Pennsylvania. The routing number (031317788) is publicly displayed, confirming their legitimacy as an established financial institution.
services: Mobile banking app with mobile deposit
PA Forward Student Loan Program access
Market rate information and competitive rate offerings
pros: Operates nine convenient branch locations across four Pennsylvania counties for local accessibility
Commits to reinvesting minimum 4% of net income back into local communities annually
Offers modern digital banking through mobile app with mobile deposit, bill pay, and Zelle transfers
Provides access to PA Forward Student Loan Program for Pennsylvania students
Comprehensive service offerings including checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and investment/retirement products
Community-focused with documented business customer success stories and long-term partnerships
Provides free educational resources through library of how-to videos and market rate transparency
cons: Geographic service limited to four central Pennsylvania counties only, not regional or national
Website lacks specific interest rates, APYs, and fee schedules for transparent comparison shopping
No visible third-party customer reviews, ratings, or independent verification of service quality on the site
Routing number displayed but no FDIC insurance or regulatory compliance details mentioned on homepage
Recent construction at Orbisonia location indicates infrastructure disruption for customers in that area
best_for: Residents of Huntingdon, Fulton, Bedford, and Franklin Counties seeking local banking relationships
Small business owners and entrepreneurs in central Pennsylvania looking for community-focused lending
Customers who prioritize community reinvestment and local economic impact in their banking decisions
Pennsylvania students and families exploring private student loan options through PHEAA partnership
diagnosis: Community State Bank of Orbisonia is best suited for residents and business owners in central Pennsylvania (Huntingdon, Fulton, Bedford, Franklin Counties) who value local banking relationships and community reinvestment. The main caveat is that this is a regionally-limited community bank without publicly displayed rates, fees, or third-party reviews, so customers cannot easily compare offerings against larger competitors or verify service quality claims independently.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
